description_long: This object consists of two large, cubic, black metal safe boxes placed side by side on a wooden platform. One of the safes is open, revealing a thick, reinforced door with visible locking bolts and a complex mechanical locking mechanism. The closed safe features a radiation warning symbol on its front, suggesting it may be used for storing hazardous or valuable materials. On top of the safes, there are several small, light-colored rectangular objects, possibly representing stacks of money or gold bars. The safes have a glossy, reflective finish, and their robust construction is evident from the thick doors and heavy-duty hinges. The overall appearance is industrial and secure, suitable for use in urban environments such as banks, vaults, or secure storage facilities.
description: A pair of large, glossy black metal safe boxes, one open to reveal a reinforced locking mechanism, with small valuables on top and a radiation warning symbol on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing both safes, one open with visible locking bolts and valuables on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the safes and the open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid backs of the safes with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open door from a different angle and valuables on top.
attribute_lock_mechanism_type: mechanical combination lock with visible rotating dial and bolt system
attribute_handle_design: fixed bar handle on the door, horizontally placed, metallic
